summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of BlacUSA MVP. 22/22 backend pytest cases pass. All frontend critical flows verified including the highest-risk Leaflet Cold-Cases map toggle (renders tiles + 10 markers + clickable popups). Newsletter, tip submission (with query-param prefill), membership join modal, theme switcher (persistence across reload), about page, category pages and article detail pages all functional. Zero React/runtime console errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: route ordering is correct — /cold-cases/stats is declared before /cold-cases/{case_number} so the path-param route does not shadow stats. Good.
server.py: _id is excluded everywhere via projection {"_id": 0}. Good.
Deprecation: @app.on_event("startup")/("shutdown") is deprecated in current FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] and ['DB_NAME'] — fail-fast pattern is correct (no defaults).
ThemeSwitcher.applyTheme is called in a useEffect with empty deps and eslint-disable — acceptable for initial mount only.
CaseMap correctly uses react-leaflet with carto tiles (no API key) — robust choice for V1.
Newsletter dedupe verified via test_subscribe_and_dedupe — second submit returns 'already on the list'.
All interactive elements have kebab-case data-testid attributes as advertised.
test_credentials: None — app is public, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 8 articles and 10 cold cases automatically on startup; verified via list endpoints. Test data created in tests uses TEST_ prefix on subscribers/tips/memberships collections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_blacusa_api.py — re-run to regression-check API. Frontend critical-path: /cold-cases List<->Map toggle is the highest-risk surface (Leaflet) and was confirmed working: 10 markers render, popups show 'View case file' link with correct /cold-cases/:caseNumber href. Theme persistence uses localStorage key 'blacusa-theme'. Submit-tip pre-fills via query params ?case=...&name=... and anonymous checkbox hides name+contact fields. Newsletter band testids: newsletter-band-email / newsletter-band-submit / newsletter-band-success.
